qas.q: What's the purpose of afto form 350?
qas.a: Provides AIS or depot tech with a complete description of a parts malfunction.

qas.q: Storing of aircraft parts is called what?
What part of form 350 do you complete for FOM purposes?
What are the codes used on Afto form 350?
qas.a: Type maintenance, action taken, when discovered, how malfunctioned, work unit.

qas.q: What are the sections of the work unit code manual in order?
qas.a: 1.List of effective pages, 2. tables of contents, 3. foreword, 4.type maintenance codes, 5.action taken codes, 6.when discovered codes, 7.how malfunction codes, 8.unique data codes, 9.support general codes, 10. Work unit codes.

qas.q: What are system numbers not the same as?
Which blocks are a required fill out in form 350?
